heading: Recognition and character of gain or loss on sale or exchange
label: 741 Recognition and character of gain or loss on sale or exchange
text: In the case of a sale or exchange of an interest in a partnership, gain or loss shall be recognized to the transferor partner. Such gain or loss shall be considered as gain or loss from the sale or exchange of a capital asset, except as otherwise provided in section 751 (relating to unrealized receivables and inventory items).
notes: Amendments2002— struck out “which have appreciated substantially in value” after “inventory items”.Pub. L. 107–147
amendments: Amendments2002— struck out “which have appreciated substantially in value” after “inventory items”.Pub. L. 107–147
